typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		ActID as string,
		UpdateHistoryID as string,
		ContractNo as string,
		SFN as string,
		Activity_Id as string,
		Work_Description_ID as string,
		SystemCode as string,
		System as string,
		SubSystemCode as string,
		SubSystem as string,
		Work_Description as string,
		Activities as string,
		Scope as string,
		Jobno as string,
		Vessel as string,
		Discipline as string,
		TaskSheet_No as string,
		Task_Name as string,
		CampaignCode as string,
		Campaign as string,
		ScopeCategory as string,
		Progress_Date as string,
		Deck as string,
		Period as string,
		Work_Type as string,
		Progress as string,
		CumEarned as string,
		Manhours as string,
		Previous_Progress as string,
		Progress_Grouping as string,
		Label1 as string,
		Label2 as string,
		Label3 as string,
		Label4 as string,
		Label5 as string,
		Label6 as string,
		Gate1 as string,
		Gate2 as string,
		Gate3 as string,
		Gate4 as string,
		Gate5 as string,
		Gate6 as string,
		QtyG1 as string,
		QtyG2 as string,
		QtyG3 as string,
		QtyG4 as string,
		QtyG5 as string,
		QtyG6 as string,
		ContractID as string,
		ItemQty as string,
		WorkTypeID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/HDMS/HDMS_Progress/HDMS_Progress.csv']) ~> sourceHDMSProgress
sourceHDMSProgress derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/HDMS/HDMS_Progress/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'HDMS_Progress_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		ActID,
		UpdateHistoryID,
		ContractNo,
		SFN,
		Activity_Id,
		Work_Description_ID,
		SystemCode,
		System,
		SubSystemCode,
		SubSystem,
		Work_Description,
		Activities,
		Scope,
		Jobno,
		Vessel,
		Discipline,
		TaskSheet_No,
		Task_Name,
		CampaignCode,
		Campaign,
		ScopeCategory,
		Progress_Date,
		Deck,
		Period,
		Work_Type,
		Progress,
		CumEarned,
		Manhours,
		Previous_Progress,
		Progress_Grouping,
		Label1,
		Label2,
		Label3,
		Label4,
		Label5,
		Label6,
		Gate1,
		Gate2,
		Gate3,
		Gate4,
		Gate5,
		Gate6,
		QtyG1,
		QtyG2,
		QtyG3,
		QtyG4,
		QtyG5,
		QtyG6,
		ContractID,
		ItemQty,
		WorkTypeID,
		FileName
	)) ~> snkHDMSProgressRaw
